$comment: Pilot partner record — copy to pilot/partners/<label>.json (gitignored). Manual, file-based; this file IS the partner registry that integrations/hosted-verify/pilot/partner-token.sh reads. NO secrets in this file, ever: the token lives in the macOS keychain and is only referenced here.
label: acme
$status_values: active (token pushed to the Worker) | disabled (token kept in keychain, removed from Worker) | revoked (token deleted everywhere)
$trustedOperators_note: The partner's BabyJubjub operator public key(s), as x:y decimal pairs. These must ALSO be appended to TRUSTED_OPERATORS in integrations/hosted-verify/wrangler.jsonc and deployed — the deployment var is the single global trust anchor; this file is the per-partner record of which keys are theirs. Per-partner operator scoping on the Worker waits for a real pilot to shape.

tierCaps.$note: @bolyra/mpp financial tiers over the SDK's cumulative permission bits: small < $100, medium < $10,000 (implies small), unlimited (implies both). Enforced by the credential's permission bitmask + the capability map — this field is the agreed pilot cap, recorded for the humans.
